message:
feat: add hackable mode selector and fix avatars

- Add installer/pnpm toggle for hackable install mode
  - "installer" option uses install.sh --install-method git (default)
  - "pnpm" option shows manual git clone workflow
  - Explains installer clones repo and sets everything up
- Fix avatar loading across home and shoutouts pages
  - Update from unavatar.io/x/ to unavatar.io/twitter/
  - Add ui-avatars.com fallback for missing profile pictures
  - Generates initials on coral background when Twitter avatar unavailable
